docs.readmeSecurityNote: Security note: Astropress now uses Argon2id for passwords, KMAC256 for token and privacy digests, and ML-DSA-65 for outbound webhook signatures. Hosted-provider live E2E remains incomplete.
docs.hostedE2EGap: Live hosted-provider coverage still depends on maintainer-owned accounts, seeded projects, and teardown automation; see `HOSTED_E2E_SETUP.md`
